problem: Can superconductivity be achieved at room temperature — what material structure?
hypothesis: If Topological insulator surface state conduction is applied to what, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Materials characterization (XRD, SEM) with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
